name: azeem-naveed-portfolio
description: Full-stack video editor portfolio website for Azeem Naveed

scripts.dev: start cmd /k "cd backend && node server.js" && cd frontend && npm run dev
scripts.install:all: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
scripts.start:prod: cd backend && set NODE_ENV=production&& node server.js
scripts.preview: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && set SERVE_FRONTEND=true&& node server.js
